A

ACADEMIC_STRESS - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
Academic stress counseling specialization.
addSlot(String, String, String, AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotActionCallback) - Method in class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository
Adds a new time slot for a counselor with available = true.
ADMIN - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.UserRole
Role assigned to platform administrators.
ALL_TAGS - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
All specialization tags in display order.
ANXIETY - Static variable in class com.example.moogerscouncil.SpecializationTags
Anxiety-related counseling specialization.
Appointment - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Represents a confirmed appointment between a student and counselor.
Appointment() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.Appointment
 
AppointmentAdapter - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
RecyclerView adapter for the counselor's appointment dashboard cards.
AppointmentAdapter(Context, List<Appointment>) - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentAdapter
Creates a new adapter.
AppointmentAdapter.ViewHolder - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
ViewHolder for a single appointment card.
AppointmentRepository - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Repository for the Firestore 'appointments' collection.
AppointmentRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.AppointmentRepository
Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'appointments' collection.
AppointmentRepository.OnAppointmentsLoadedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for operations that return a list of appointments.
AppointmentRepository.OnBookingCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Three-way callback for the booking transaction.
AppointmentRepository.OnStatusUpdateCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for appointment status update operations.
AvailabilityRepository - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Repository for the Firestore 'slots' collection.
AvailabilityRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilityRepository
Initialises the repository with a reference to the 'slots' collection.
AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotActionCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for slot write operations (add / remove).
AvailabilityRepository.OnSlotsLoadedCallback - Interface in com.example.moogerscouncil
Callback for operations that return a list of time slots.
AvailabilitySchedule - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Local (non-Firestore) model that groups TimeSlot objects by date for a single counselor.
AvailabilitySchedule(String) - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySchedule
Constructs an empty schedule for the given counselor.
AvailabilitySetupActivity - Class in com.example.moogerscouncil
Screen where a counselor can view their existing time slots, add new ones via date/time pickers, and swipe-to-delete available slots.
AvailabilitySetupActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.moogerscouncil.AvailabilitySetupActivity
